required_evidence: Generated offer file exists for the same merchant
Offer sections include problem, benchmark, fix recommendation, pricing, and proof deliverables
Merchant identity matches the active client record
offer_generated.downstream_action: Authorize send and await send result.

required_evidence: Client registry note with type offer_sent
Client registry proof message for OFFER_SENT
Action unit proof_status equals offer_sent_logged
offer_sent.downstream_action: Wait for merchant open, reply, decline, expiry, or payment signal.

required_evidence: Open tracking event for the sent offer
Same merchant identity as the offer
offer_opened.downstream_action: Follow up or respond to engagement.

required_evidence: Inbound reply tied to the sent offer
Reply references the same merchant identity
offer_replied.downstream_action: Record reply intent and route toward close, decline, or payment.

required_evidence: Explicit decline from the merchant
Reason recorded when available
offer_declined.downstream_action: Close the opportunity or retain for future follow-up.

required_evidence: Offer reached its expiry condition without conversion
No payment or accepted reply before expiry
offer_expired.downstream_action: Send follow-up or mark the opportunity stale.

required_evidence: Verified payment is recorded for the same merchant
Payment status is paid and amount is known
Payment can be tied to the ShopiFixer Fix Sprint
offer_paid.downstream_action: Activate fulfillment truth for the paid sprint.

required_evidence: Verified payment exists for the same merchant
Fulfillment truth exists for the same merchant
Offer moved from commercial intent into execution-ready delivery
offer_converted.downstream_action: Begin or continue the fulfillment loop with proof-backed delivery.

conversion_event_definition: An offer converts when the authorized ShopiFixer offer is accepted and verified payment exists for the same merchant, with the fulfillment truth model ready to enter or already in the paid delivery loop.
payment_event_definition: A payment event exists when the client registry records a verified paid ShopiFixer deal for the same merchant, with payment status, amount, and closure evidence available from runtime truth.
fulfillment_start_definition: Fulfillment starts when the ShopiFixer fulfillment truth item for the same merchant becomes payment_received with execution_status not_started, proof_status not_started, and completion_status not_started.

current_outcome_state.note: The current state is inferred from the observed send proof in the active client record and the matching offer state in the action unit.

allowed_next_states.note: Next states are the valid post-send outcomes tracked by this authority.

offer_generated.note: The generated offer file is the source of the pre-send commercial artifact.

offer_sent.note: The active client record contains the send proof note.

offer_opened.note: No open-tracking evidence is currently present in the read sources.

offer_replied.note: No reply evidence is currently present in the read sources.

offer_declined.note: No decline evidence is currently present in the read sources.

offer_expired.note: No expiry record is currently present in the read sources.

offer_paid.note: The active client record is still not billable and no paid state is recorded.

offer_converted.note: The fulfillment truth exists, but the item remains waiting_for_payment.

conversion_event_definition.note: Defined from payment verification plus fulfillment readiness.

payment_event_definition.note: Payment is only real when the client registry reflects verified paid truth.

fulfillment_start_definition.note: Fulfillment authority defines the minimum start conditions.

unavailable_fields.reason: No open-tracking source is present in the current read set.
No inbound reply source is present in the current read set.
No explicit decline record is present in the current read set.
No expiry record is present in the current read set.
The active client record is not paid.
The fulfillment truth item is still waiting_for_payment.
